articles.title: Major Medical Journal Buries Pfizer's Flu Vaccine Failure in Seniors — Data Too Damaging to Publish?
articles.summary: A prestigious medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's failed flu vaccine data showing poor efficacy in seniors, the very population most aggressively targeted for vaccination. This selective data reporting exposes how Big Pharma and academic journals collaborate to hide inconvenient truths about vaccine performance.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Report — The Devastating Health Toll They Don't Want You to See
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the catastrophic health consequences of COVID lockdowns, school closures, and mandates that health authorities continue to ignore. The collateral damage from these policies far exceeded any claimed benefits, yet no accountability exists for the architects of this destruction.

articles.title: Vaccine Industry's Economic Shell Game — How Government Subsidies Corrupt Medical Science
articles.summary: Analysis exposes how massive government subsidies to the vaccine industry eliminate normal market feedback mechanisms, creating perverse incentives that prioritize profit over safety. Without price signals and liability, vaccine manufacturers operate in a consequence-free bubble that distorts medical decision-making.

articles.title: Medical Student Suicide After School's Misconduct Allegations — Academic Medicine's Mental Health Crisis
articles.summary: Vaibhav Duggal took his own life after facing accusations and pressure from medical school administrators in a late-night email confrontation. His parents hold the institution responsible, highlighting the toxic culture and psychological abuse endemic in medical education that drives students to desperation.

articles.title: Microplastics Epidemic — The Environmental Health Crisis Being Ignored by Regulators
articles.summary: Emerging evidence links microplastic contamination to chronic disease as these particles lodge deep in human organs and circulate through bloodstreams. Despite mounting evidence of systemic health threats, regulatory agencies remain silent while plastic pollution continues unchecked.

articles.title: Air Pollution's Devastating Fetal Impact — Study Reveals Toxic Metal Contamination in Placentas
articles.summary: AIIMS researchers discovered toxic metals in placental tissue and identified how air pollution restricts fetal growth, increases preeclampsia risk, and damages babies before birth. This environmental health crisis receives minimal attention while industries continue polluting with impunity.

articles.title: Research Integrity Collapse — Moffitt Executive Steps Down, NSF Watchdog Unit Empty
articles.summary: Major cancer center executive forced out following investigation while NSF's oversight unit sits vacant, exposing the systematic breakdown of scientific integrity mechanisms. The hijacked journal epidemic continues growing with over 450 entries as academic corruption spreads unchecked.

articles.title: GLP-1 Genetic Resistance — Stanford Exposes Why Weight Loss Drugs Fail 10% of Patients
articles.summary: Stanford researchers identified genetic variants that render Ozempic and Wegovy ineffective in roughly 10% of patients, information that could have prevented countless failed treatments. This pharmacogenetic data reveals how personalized medicine insights are buried while one-size-fits-all approaches dominate clinical practice.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Exposes Empty NSF Watchdog Unit — Who's Policing Scientific Misconduct?
articles.summary: Retraction Watch reveals NSF's oversight unit is essentially empty while scientific misconduct cases pile up. With over 65,000 entries in their retraction database and 450+ hijacked journals identified, the foxes are clearly running the henhouse. Meanwhile, Moffitt executives quietly step down following corruption probes.

articles.title: Microplastics Found Lodged in Human Organs — The Chronic Disease Connection They Don't Want You to Know
articles.summary: Emerging evidence directly links microplastic contamination to chronic disease as these particles circulate through bloodstreams and embed in living tissue. You're absorbing plastic daily through air, food, and water, but mainstream medicine ignores this environmental toxin epidemic.

articles.title: Medical Student Suicide After School's Late-Night Harassment — The Dark Side of Medical Education
articles.summary: Vaibhav Duggal took his own life after facing accusations and harassment from medical school administrators. His parents blame the institution's toxic culture and late-night intimidation tactics. Medical schools are destroying the very people they claim to train as healers.

articles.title: Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data Buried by Major Journal — Seniors Left in the Dark
articles.summary: A prestigious medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's failed flu vaccine efficacy data in seniors, hiding evidence that the shots don't work in vulnerable populations. This is textbook pharma fraud — burying inconvenient results while promoting ineffective products to those who need protection most.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Finally Documented — The Carnage They Tried to Hide
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the shocking scope of damage caused by COVID policies, from developmental delays in children to economic devastation. The public health establishment spent years denying these harms while silencing critics. The evidence is now undeniable.

articles.title: Vaccine Industry's Economic Calculation Problem — When Profit Trumps Science
articles.summary: Jeffrey Tucker exposes how the vaccine industry operates without proper economic calculation, distorting risk-benefit analysis through government subsidies and liability protection. Market signals are completely corrupted when pharma profits are guaranteed regardless of product performance.

articles.title: Robert Malone Challenges Bioethics Orthodoxy — Freedom vs. Medical Authoritarianism
articles.summary: Dr. Robert Malone dissects how bioethics has been weaponized to justify medical coercion and eliminate patient choice. The bioethics establishment abandoned informed consent principles to serve pharmaceutical and government interests during COVID.

articles.title: Stanford Reveals Why Ozempic Fails — Genetic Truth Big Pharma Doesn't Want Known
articles.summary: Stanford researchers identify genetic variants that make GLP-1 drugs ineffective in 10% of patients, exposing the one-size-fits-all drug model as fraudulent. Personalized medicine threatens pharma's blockbuster model, so this critical genetic information gets buried in academic journals.

articles.title: Senate Hearing Exposes Years-Long Cover-Up of COVID Vaccine Cancer Links
articles.summary: Multiple oncologists testified before the U.S. Senate that stable cancer patients experienced aggressive relapses after mRNA booster shots. Researchers reported coordinated attacks on their reputations for attempting to publish findings linking COVID-19 vaccines to increased cancer risk.

articles.title: Medical Authoritarians Wage Systematic War on Health Freedom — FDA Leads the Charge
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney Jonathan Emord and Dr. Robert Verkerk expose how the U.S. government and FDA have systematically dismantled health freedom. The medical establishment's authoritarian control over treatment options represents the most urgent threat to medical autonomy in modern history.

articles.title: Major Journal Caught Red-Handed Burying Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data in Seniors
articles.summary: Maryanne Demasi exposes how a major medical journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's failed flu vaccine efficacy data in elderly patients. The systematic suppression of negative pharmaceutical trial results continues unabated in supposedly peer-reviewed literature.

articles.title: Microplastics Epidemic Linked to Chronic Disease — Evidence Buried by Industry
articles.summary: Microscopic plastic particles are lodged deep within human organs and circulating through bloodstreams, with emerging evidence linking them to chronic disease. The plastics industry and regulatory capture have kept this health crisis out of mainstream medical discourse.

articles.title: Moffitt Cancer Center Executive Steps Down Following Internal Probe — What They're Hiding
articles.summary: A Moffitt Cancer Center executive resigned following an internal investigation, while the NSF's watchdog unit sits mysteriously empty. Retraction Watch reveals the ongoing crisis of accountability in medical research institutions.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Whistleblower: Ohio Lacks Political Will to Confront Healthcare Corruption
articles.summary: Mehek Cooke testified before Congress that Ohio's Medicaid system is riddled with fraud while state officials lack the political will to prosecute. The testimony reveals systematic healthcare fraud as a 'national embarrassment' protected by political interests.

articles.title: COVID Policy Architects Escape Accountability for 'Shocking Damage' — Where's Justice?
articles.summary: Ian Miller documents the devastating damage caused by COVID policies while those responsible face zero accountability. The systematic suppression of policy criticism continues as public health officials dodge responsibility for lockdown harms.

articles.title: Vaccine Industry's Economic Model Built on Market Manipulation — Not Science
articles.summary: Jeffrey Tucker exposes how the vaccine industry operates outside normal economic calculation, relying on government mandates rather than market competition. The industry's business model depends on regulatory capture and political coercion rather than demonstrating actual efficacy.

articles.title: Senate Exposes Years-Long Cover-Up of COVID Vaccine Cancer Links
articles.summary: U.S. Senate hearing revealed systematic suppression of mRNA vaccine-cancer connections, with multiple oncologists testifying about aggressive cancer relapses post-booster. Researchers faced coordinated attacks on their reputations for reporting these findings.

articles.title: Major Medical Journal Caught Burying Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data
articles.summary: Leading journal under fire for deliberately omitting Pfizer's negative efficacy data in seniors from flu vaccine studies. Another example of academic publishing serving pharma interests over scientific integrity.

articles.title: Health Freedom Under Attack: FDA's War on Medical Choice Exposed
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney and health experts reveal systematic FDA campaign to eliminate health freedom and centralize medical control. Government agencies actively suppressing alternative treatments while protecting pharmaceutical monopolies.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Whistleblower: Ohio Officials Lacked Political Will to Fight Corruption
articles.summary: National security analyst Mehek Cooke testified about systematic Medicaid fraud in Ohio, calling it a 'national embarrassment.' Officials knew about widespread corruption but refused to act, protecting fraudulent operators.

articles.title: Microplastics Linked to Chronic Disease — Evidence Industry Doesn't Want You to See
articles.summary: Emerging research links microscopic plastic particles circulating in bloodstream to chronic diseases. Industry-funded studies consistently downplay risks while independent research reveals alarming health impacts from daily plastic absorption.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Reveals Empty NSF Watchdog Unit — Who's Minding the Store?
articles.summary: National Science Foundation's oversight unit sits vacant while research misconduct runs rampant. Cancer center executive steps down following probe, highlighting systematic failures in scientific integrity enforcement.
